commands.name: GenerateOverview
commands.description: Build a cross-domain relationship diagram showing all bounded contexts

commands.name: SelectView
commands.description: Switch between aggregate map, event flow, or command graph

commands.name: FilterByAggregate
commands.description: Show only nodes related to a specific aggregate

commands.name: RunAnalysis
commands.description: Analyze domain patterns -- coupling, cohesion, naming issues

aggregates.name: EventStorm
aggregates.description: Interactive event storming session. Place and arrange domain concept stickies.

commands.name: StartStorm
commands.description: Begin a new event storming session with a name

commands.name: PlaceSticky
commands.description: Place a new sticky note on the board

commands.name: MoveSticky
commands.description: Reposition a sticky on the board

commands.name: ConvertToDomain
commands.description: Transform stickies into Bluebook DSL aggregates, commands, and events

aggregates.name: Glossary
aggregates.description: Ubiquitous language dictionary. Defines terms and enforces naming consistency.

commands.name: ShowGlossary
commands.description: Display the full glossary of domain terms

commands.name: DefineTerm
commands.description: Add or update a term in the glossary

commands.name: RenameTerm
commands.description: Rename a term and cascade the change to all references

commands.name: FlagAmbiguity
commands.description: Mark a term as ambiguous -- needs team clarification

commands.name: LinkTerms
commands.description: Declare a relationship between two glossary terms

aggregates.name: Insight
aggregates.description: Domain health analysis -- coupling metrics, design smells, completeness checks.

commands.name: AnalyzeDomain
commands.description: Run all analysis rules against the current domain

commands.name: DismissInsight
commands.description: Acknowledge and hide a specific finding

commands.name: ConfigureRules
commands.description: Enable or disable specific analysis rules

aggregates.name: Migration
aggregates.description: Breaking change detection and migration path generation between domain versions.

commands.name: DetectChanges
commands.description: Compare current bluebook against a previous version

commands.name: GenerateMigration
commands.description: Produce a migration script for the detected changes

commands.name: ApplyMigration
commands.description: Execute the migration against a target environment

aggregates.name: Notification
aggregates.description: Alert feed — surfaces errors, warnings, and confirmations to the user.

commands.name: NotifyUser
commands.description: Surface an alert to the user

commands.name: DismissAlert
commands.description: Mark a specific alert as seen

commands.name: ClearAllAlerts
commands.description: Dismiss and remove every alert

aggregates.name: Search
aggregates.description: Full-text search across domains, aggregates, commands, and events.

commands.name: SearchDomain
commands.description: Search across all domain elements for a query

commands.name: ClearSearch
commands.description: Reset query and discard all matches

commands.name: FilterResults
commands.description: Narrow matches to a specific element type

aggregates.name: Screenshot
aggregates.description: Rolling frame buffer for visual debugging of browser state.

commands.name: CaptureFrame
commands.description: Save a screenshot frame from the browser

commands.name: PauseCapture
commands.description: Stop capturing frames without clearing the buffer

commands.name: ResumeCapture
commands.description: Resume capturing frames after a pause

aggregates.name: AcceptanceTest
aggregates.description: Runs domain commands and validates the event log against expected outcomes.

commands.name: RunAllTests
commands.description: Dispatch every domain command and collect results

commands.name: RunSingleTest
commands.description: Dispatch one command and validate its event

commands.name: ResetResults
commands.description: Clear all results and return to idle

aggregates.name: Scenario
aggregates.description: Executable given/when/then specification that validates domain behavior.

commands.name: WriteScenario
commands.description: Define a new scenario with a descriptive name

commands.name: AddStep
commands.description: Append a step to the scenario

commands.name: ExecuteScenario
commands.description: Run all steps and record pass/fail for each

commands.name: RecordOutcome
commands.description: Store the outcome after scenario execution

aggregates.name: Fixture
aggregates.description: Reusable data set that seeds scenarios with known aggregate state.

commands.name: DefineFixture
commands.description: Create a new named fixture set

commands.name: AddEntry
commands.description: Append a seed record to the fixture

commands.name: ApplyToScenario
commands.description: Load this fixture as given-state for a scenario

aggregates.name: Playground
aggregates.description: Interactive sandbox for dispatching commands and inspecting live state.

commands.name: OpenPlayground
commands.description: Launch the sandbox for a domain

commands.name: ExecuteCommand
commands.description: Dispatch a domain command inside the sandbox

commands.name: InspectState
commands.description: View the current state of an aggregate in the sandbox

commands.name: ResetSandbox
commands.description: Clear all sandbox state and start fresh

aggregates.name: Layout
aggregates.description: IDE chrome — panels, tabs, sidebar, shortcuts, persisted geometry.

aggregates.name: KeyboardShortcut
aggregates.description: Keyboard shortcut bindings for IDE navigation and actions.

aggregates.name: LayoutState
aggregates.description: Persisted layout preferences — current file, saved panel arrangement.

aggregates.name: Session
aggregates.description: IDE session — sketch vs play mode, WebSocket connection lifecycle.

aggregates.name: Workbench
aggregates.description: Live domain interaction — select project and aggregate, dispatch commands.

aggregates.name: Agent
aggregates.description: AI chat panel — conversation history, domain review requests.

aggregates.name: Menu
aggregates.description: IDE menu bar — File, View, Domain dropdowns.

aggregates.name: EventStream
aggregates.description: Live event feed — streams domain events to the IDE console.
